text: {"matches":[{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":2,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 2 asserts all aspects work brilliantly, a stricter condition than merely checking if the whole app is production ready (claim 0)."},{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":6,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Making the whole app experience seamless end‑to‑end (claim 6) implies the app is production ready (claim 0)."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":2,"toIndex":6,"rationale":"Claim 2 concerns functional correctness of every aspect, while claim 6 concerns user‑experience smoothness; both can be true but address different scopes."},{"type":"broader","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Claim 3 is a general call to improve the app overall, without specifying that every aspect works brilliantly as in claim 2, so it is broader."},{"type":"broader","fromIndex":3,"toIndex":6,"rationale":"Claim 3’s generic improvement goal is more general than the specific aim of making the whole app experience seamless end‑to‑end (claim 6)."},{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 1 focuses on the run pipeline, a subset of the whole app considered in claim 0."},{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":6,"rationale":"Improving the run pipeline end‑to‑end (claim 1) is a specific part of making the whole app experience seamless end‑to‑end (claim 6)."},{"type":"narrower","fromIndex":1,"toIndex":2,"rationale":"Ensuring the run pipeline works end‑to‑end (claim 1) is a specific component of the claim that every aspect of the app works brilliantly (claim 2)."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":4,"toIndex":5,"rationale":"Claim 4 addresses visual design of the graph, while claim 5 addresses interactive behavior; they concern different aspects of the same component."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":4,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 4 concerns graph design alignment, whereas claim 0 concerns overall production readiness; they refer to different scopes."},{"type":"compatible-different-scope","fromIndex":5,"toIndex":0,"rationale":"Claim 5 deals with graph item click behavior, while claim 0 deals with whole‑app production readiness; scopes differ."}]}
